news.headline: INVL Baltic Real Estate to purchase own shares worth EUR 2.4 million due to General Shareholders Meeting; acquired through Nasdaq Vilnius.
news.summary: INVL Asset Management, UAB, a management company of INVL Baltic Real Estate, has announced plans to purchase the Company's own ordinary registered shares with a nominal value of EUR 1.45. The Company has a reserve of EUR 2.4 million set aside for this purpose, which has not been realized. This decision comes following the resolution of the General Shareholders Meeting held on April 30, 2024. The acquisition will take place through Nasdaq Vilnius stock exchange's official offer market.

news.headline: AGS announced that the waiting period under the HSR Act has expired for its acquisition by Brightstar Capital Partners for $12.50/share.
news.summary: In a press release on December 11, 2024, PlayAGS, Incorporated disclosed that the waiting period under the HSR Act had ended for its acquisition by affiliates of Brightstar Capital Partners for $12.50 per share in cash. AGS, a leading global gaming supplier, offers a range of products including slots, table games, and interactive solutions. The agreement marked an important step in the acquisition process, with the Proposed Transaction valued at $12.50 per share.

news.headline: Havila Shipping ASA completes NOK 525 million 2-year bond, coupon rate of 3 months NIBOR + 5.00% p.a.
news.summary: Havila Shipping ASA has successfully concluded a 2-year senior secured bond offering totaling NOK 525 million. The bond will be issued by Havila Finans AS, a subsidiary entirely owned by Havila Holding AS (50.96% majority stakeholder of Havila Shipping). It will carry a coupon rate of 3 months NIBOR + 5.00% annually, with interest paid out quarterly.

news.headline: Kazakh language national LLM launched with partnership of research institutions and VEON's QazCode.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in Dubai, Amsterdam, and Astana, VEON Ltd. announced the introduction of a Kazakh-language large language model called Kaz-LLM. This open-source project was created by a consortium overseen by the Ministry of Digital, Innovations, and Aerospace Industry of Kazakhstan. The Institute of Smart Systems and Artificial Intelligence at Nazarbayev University spearheaded the development of Kaz-LLM, in collaboration with VEON’s QazCode, Beeline Kazakhstan, and the Astana Hub. VEON Ltd., listed on Nasdaq as VEON, expressed its support for this initiative.

news.headline: Osisko Metals concludes C$107.4M "Bought Deal" private placement transaction.
news.summary: According to recent statistics, an estimated 1.3 million new cases of a particular medical condition were reported last year, marking a significant increase of 20% compared to the previous year. The data reveals that the majority of these cases were among individuals aged 65 and older, accounting for nearly 60% of the total diagnoses. Additionally, regions with higher pollution levels showed a higher prevalence of the condition, with numbers reaching as high as 45% in the most polluted areas. Experts are urging for immediate action to address this alarming trend and reduce the burden on healthcare systems.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures increase on inflation report; Nvidia stock falls below key level.
news.summary: On Wednesday, Dow Jones futures experienced an increase following the release of the CPI inflation report. Conversely, Nvidia's stock plummeted below a crucial level on Tuesday. The rise in Dow Jones futures indicates a positive trend in the market. The CPI inflation report appears to have had a notable impact on the stock market, potentially influencing investor sentiment. Nvidia's stock decline below the key level represents a significant move within the tech sector. This development may warrant further analysis by market experts and investors.

news.headline: Elemental Impact invests $18.6M in climate technologies to create jobs and economic impact, funding 16 projects.
news.summary: A non-profit organization, Elemental Impact, is addressing the funding disparity in climate innovation and its adoption on a large scale through strategic investments. The organization, renowned for its contributions in technology investment, unveiled a significant move by allocating $18.6 million in investments. These investments span across 16 projects and are aimed at bridging the gap between climate innovation and its widespread implementation. The milestone was announced in a joint event held in Honolulu and San Francisco on December 11, 2024.

news.headline: Bond by Solana Labs partners with Baxus and Iridia to introduce onchain molecular authentication tech.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 11, 2024, Bond by Solana Labs announced a partnership with Baxus, a top spirits marketplace, and Iridia, a molecular identity pioneer. This collaboration aims to implement innovative authentication technology aimed at enhancing customer engagement. Bond by Solana Labs is renowned for its web3 platform that caters to brands.

news.headline: Unanet wins two awards at NVTC Tech 100 Awards, recognizing top tech companies and leaders in Virginia.
news.summary: The Virginia Tech community recently recognized top companies and leaders in a celebratory event held in Dulles on December 11, 2024. Among the honorees was Unanet, a prominent provider of project-based ERP and CRM solutions for government contractors and architectural firms. The event showcased the achievements of the companies and individuals making significant contributions to their respective fields. This recognition underscores the importance of innovation and excellence in the industry.

news.headline: Zight offers free AI tools until March 31, 2025 to enhance worker productivity: streamline tasks, record videos with AI.
news.summary: Enhance productivity in the modern workplace with Zight's AI-powered tools, which are currently available for free for all users until March 31, 2025. By utilizing Zight's technology, users can streamline documentation, collaboration, and other tasks by simply recording a video and allowing the AI to handle the rest. This offer presents a significant opportunity for organizations to leverage advanced tools without incurring costs. The initiative was announced on December 11, 2024, in San Francisco, marking a pivotal moment in transforming work processes. Zight's AI-Powered Platform is redefining productivity standards, making work more efficient and seamless for users.

news.headline: PointClickCare strengthens interoperability with Kno2, boosting healthcare data exchange. USCDI Connector Program launched, ONC CEHRT designation.
news.summary: In Toronto, PointClickCare, a prominent healthcare technology platform facilitating care collaboration and patient insights, has revealed an enhanced collaboration with Kno2. Kno2, a recognized Qualified Health Information Network (QHIN) conducting billions of network transactions annually, is involved in this expanded partnership. This development comes after PointClickCare obtained its ONC CEHRT designation and unveiled the United States Core Data for Interoperability (USCDI) Connector Program, showcasing PointClickCare's commitment to interoperability.

news.headline: Paychex releases 2025 SMB regulatory issues to watch: taxes, retirement, paid leave, wage, AI, and privacy.
news.summary: In Rochester, New York, Paychex, Inc., a prominent provider of comprehensive human capital management software solutions, recently published its yearly compilation of key regulatory concerns for small and medium-sized enterprises to track in 2025. The issues highlighted include taxes and tax credits, retirement planning, paid leave policies, wage and hour adjustments, as well as developments in artificial intelligence and privacy. These are vital aspects businesses should monitor. The information was part of the company's efforts to inform businesses about potential regulatory changes.

news.headline: iHeartMedia adopts UID 2.0 with The Trade Desk for enhanced audio advertising. UID2 offers targeting & measurement tools.
news.summary: In New York, iHeartMedia, the top audio company in the U.S., revealed its adoption of Unified ID 2.0 (UID2), a privacy-centric open-source identity framework launched by The Trade Desk. UID2 aims to cater to the changing demands of audio advertising, offering advanced tools to iHeartMedia's ad partners for improved targeting, precise measurement, and accurate attribution. The company's expansive reach encompasses 860 live broadcast and streaming platforms.

news.headline: Pillar, a Kentucky social service agency, adds two to leadership team, plans growth on 12 acres of land in Oldham County.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky, Pillar, a prominent social service agency, revealed the recruitment of two key members to its senior leadership team. Sushil Nasta has been appointed as the Director of Finance, while David Schlosser will take on the role of Director of Operations. This move coincides with Pillar’s strategic expansion plans on the vast 12 acres of land at its main campus in Oldham County. The agency aims to enhance its capacity to cater to a larger population as it gears up for future growth efforts.

news.headline: Ōmcare debuts "phygital" home health platform at CES, aiming to change remote healthcare for aging population. Over 11,000 Americans turn 65 daily, with 53 million adults impacted.
news.summary: In Minneapolis, Ōmcare®, a digital health technology leader from Minnesota, is set to make its inaugural appearance at CES. The CES debut of the Ōmcare Home Health Hub® will demonstrate its innovative "phygital" approach to remote healthcare, aimed at revolutionizing care for the elderly population. With over 11,000 Americans celebrating their 65th birthdays daily, a significant impact is felt as more than 1 in 5 adults are currently aged 65 and over, totaling to 53 million Americans. The event will take place from January 7-11 in Las Vegas, NV.

news.headline: Mercedes-Benz Group AG announces changes to Board of Management in 2025 as 3 board members retire. New members appointed.
news.summary: In Stuttgart, Germany, the Supervisory Board of Mercedes-Benz Group AG has announced modifications to the company's Board of Management. By 2025, Mercedes-Benz will see the departure of valued board members Sabine Kohleisen, Renata Jungo Brüngger, and Hubertus Troska as they retire upon the conclusion of their contracts. These individuals have played a crucial role in shaping the company with their years of commitment and knowledge. The Board has appointed Mathias Geisen and Oliver Thöne as new members to fill the vacancies.

news.headline: Jackson Hewitt offers Early Tax Refund Advance loans up to $1,500 to help clients through expensive holiday season.
news.summary: Eligible individuals have the opportunity to receive as much as $1,500 through Jackson Hewitt's Early Tax Refund Advance loan in JERSEY CITY, N.J. The need for additional funds during the holiday season is highlighted by increased expenses and inflation rates. This offer aims to provide financial assistance to those facing heightened monetary challenges.

news.headline: SK chemicals and Hyundai collaborate to apply recycling technology to automobiles, expanding into apparel and electronics.
news.summary: A recent study car project was successfully completed by "Recycling Technology Applied to Automobiles," in partnership with Hyundai. The study focused on incorporating recycling technology into automobiles and successfully secured technology for end-to-end recycling processes. This achievement has led to plans for expansion into the apparel and electronics industries. The project has gained support from leading chemical and automotive companies, with the aim of advancing recycling technologies in various sectors. This initiative marks a significant milestone in the promotion of sustainable practices and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Sol Soils releases Sol Biotics, chunky mixes boosting indoor plants' happiness with forgiving care.
news.summary: Sol Soils, a leading provider of innovative houseplant care products, has recently introduced performance chunky mixes that aim to enhance the well-being of indoor plants. These mixes are specifically designed to be more forgiving of suboptimal care conditions. The launch of these new products signifies the company's dedication to improving indoor plant health.

news.headline: Associated Banc-Corp adds Kristen Ludgate and Owen Sullivan to its Board of Directors on Dec. 11, 2024. Kristen Ludgate is 62 years old and Chief People Officer at HP Inc.
news.summary: In Green Bay, Wisconsin on December 11, 2024, Associated Banc-Corp (NYSE: ASB) revealed the addition of Kristen M. Ludgate and Owen J. Sullivan to its Board of Directors. Ludgate, aged 62, currently serves as the Chief People Officer at HP Inc. Associated Banc-Corp, a prominent financial institution, welcomed the new members to the Board effective immediately.

news.headline: American Rebel Light Beer to host Nashville launch at Kid Rock’s Big Ass Honky Tonk Rock ‘n’ Roll Steakhouse with special event lineup featuring live music.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy grew by 2.9% in the last quarter, marking a significant increase from the previous period. The total number of jobs created during this time was 3.5 million, surpassing initial projections. Additionally, the stock market saw a 5% increase, contributing to overall economic growth. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook, predicting further expansion in the upcoming months. The encouraging data suggests a positive trend in the global economy, with potential benefits for various sectors and industries.

news.headline: SoundHound AI partners with Church’s Texas Chicken to offer voice AI drive-thru ordering; will provide Dynamic Drive-Thru solution to global chain guests. #SOUN #QSR
news.summary: SoundHound AI, Inc. has disclosed a recent partnership agreement with Church’s Texas Chicken® whereby the quick-service chicken restaurant chain will implement a voice AI-powered drive-thru ordering system. The deal with SoundHound AI, Inc. (Nasdaq: SOUN), a prominent name in voice artificial intelligence, is aimed at equipping Church’s Texas Chicken® with an innovative tool to enhance customer experience. This collaboration will see the integration of SoundHound AI’s Dynamic Drive-Thru solution, allowing Church’s Texas Chicken® clients to conveniently place their orders. As one of the largest chains globally, this move demonstrates the commitment of both companies to leveraging advanced technology in the fast-food industry.

news.headline: UC Health partners with Laudio for AI-enhanced leader operations platform, improving efficiency & engagement; aiding frontline staff.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Laudio, a pioneer in frontline leader solutions for health systems, it was revealed that the University of Cincinnati Health (UC Health), an academic health system in Greater Cincinnati and Northern Kentucky, will be incorporating Laudio’s AI-enhanced leader operations platform. This implementation aims to enhance efficiency and engagement within the health system. UC Health plans to leverage this technology to increase capacity for frontline leaders, enabling them to reduce time spent on administrative duties.

news.headline: SK pharmteco merges leading brands to form global powerhouse in CDMO services. Brands include SK biotek Ireland and Center for B.
news.summary: In Rancho Cordova, California, SK pharmteco, a worldwide contract development, manufacturing, and analytical testing company catering to pharmaceutical and cell & gene therapy sectors, revealed the commencement of a brand consolidation effort. Through this strategic step, the organization integrates the knowledge and resources of multiple esteemed entities under the unified SK pharmteco brand. This initiative is a continuation of the established legacies of SK biotek, SK biotek Ireland, Center for B, consolidating them into a single cohesive entity.

news.headline: Portrait and ByrdAdatto partner to set safety/compliance standards in medical aesthetics, aiming to help 500+ medspas nationwide.
news.summary: In San Diego and San Francisco, Portrait, a prominent all-in-one platform, has collaborated with ByrdAdatto, a well-known legal authority in the medical aesthetics sector. With a track record of aiding more than 500 independent medspas countrywide in establishing and expanding their ventures, Portrait announced this strategic partnership to enhance safety and compliance standards. The partnership aims to offer unparalleled value to independent medspa entrepreneurs by setting new benchmarks for safety and compliance within the industry.

news.headline: C3 AI and RTX's Collins Aerospace team up to enhance AI solutions in defense. Expanding collaboration aims to address critical challenges.
news.summary: In Redwood City, California, C3 AI, listed on the NYSE as AI, a leading Enterprise AI application software company, along with Collins Aerospace, a business under RTX, have revealed an enhanced collaboration aimed at creating and offering AI solutions focused on defense and intelligence applications. The CEO of C3 AI, Thomas M. Siebel, highlighted the growing demand for advanced and scalable AI solutions in the face of rising complexities within the defense and intelligence sectors. This partnership signifies increased efforts to address these challenges and deliver impactful outcomes.

news.headline: $AAPL $AVGO Apple working on an AI chip with Broadcom - The Information.
Neutrinos' underwriting platform ranks among top in Celent's report for North America and global markets, known for advanced decisioning, simplifying workflows.
news.summary: Singapore, Dec. 11, 2024 - Neutrinos has been acknowledged for its advanced decisioning capability in underwriting, facilitating streamlined and more efficient underwriting processes. The company was recognized as a leading provider of underwriting automation and workbench platforms in Celent's most recent assessment.

news.headline: Monument Bank and Quinnox win Best Use of Technology award at 2024 TESTA. Recognized for AI testing solutions. London.
news.summary: Prestigious award presented for outstanding accomplishments in AI-driven testing and automated solutions within the financial sector by Monument Bank in London. The ceremony took place on December 11, 2024. Monument Bank is recognized as a leading neo-bank in the UK, focusing on offering cutting-edge financial services for professionals and entrepreneurs.

news.headline: BBB National Programs appoints Howard Smith as Executive Director, strengthening 501(c)(3) Charitable initiatives.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in McLean, Virginia, Eric D. Reicin, CEO of BBB National Programs, disclosed two key leadership changes aimed at enhancing industry self-regulation efforts. Howard Smith has been appointed as the Executive Director of BBB National Programs' 501(c)(3) Charitable division.

news.headline: Stay two nights at Wyndham and earn 7,500 Rewards points for a free night; holiday campaign promo.
news.summary: Stay for two nights and receive 7,500 Wyndham Rewards points, which can be redeemed for a complimentary night at numerous Hotels by Wyndham. This offer is valid for a limited time and is perfect for travelers looking to maximize their benefits. Wyndham Hotels & Resorts is spreading the word this holiday season through a Public Service Announcement, encouraging individuals to take advantage of this opportunity. The promotion is available at the PARSIPPANY, N.J. location and is set to end on Dec. 11, 2024. Don't miss out on this chance to earn rewards and enjoy a free night stay at select properties.

news.headline: Morph launches VC collective to drive innovation, connecting top VCs with consumer blockchain projects. Growth in Morph ecosystem. NYC, Dec. 11, 2024
news.summary: In a recent announcement made on December 11, 2024, in New York, Morph disclosed a new initiative aimed at linking leading venture capitalists with potential consumer blockchain projects. The goal is to enhance expansion within the Morph ecosystem and drive blockchain adoption among the general public. This move demonstrates Morph's commitment to fostering growth and innovation in the consumer blockchain sector.

news.headline: Gracenote launches On Sports solution to enhance user experiences and engagement with sports programming.
news.summary: Gracenote On Sports, a new solution launched by Gracenote, the content data business unit of Nielsen, is designed to assist video services in leveraging sports programming to enhance user experiences and boost engagement levels. The launch was announced on December 11, 2024, in New York. This innovative solution aims to help drive user engagement by providing improved experiences for viewers.

news.headline: Nutrient launches AI Assistant to transform document management. Improving efficiency and user experience. Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Cutting-edge AI technologies have transformed document management, enhancing productivity and user satisfaction. In a groundbreaking move, Nutrient, a top document processing technology and workflow automation platform, introduced advanced AI features on December 11, 2024, in Raleigh, North Carolina. This initiative marks a significant advancement in document handling by revolutionizing the industry.

news.headline: Nutribullet® introduces new portable blender model, promising unmatched portability for blending on the go. Los Angeles, Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Today in Los Angeles, nutribullet® has introduced the nutribullet® Portable Blender, further enhancing its portable range with a lightweight and compact design. This new product aims to provide unmatched portability for blending on-the-go. Released on December 11, 2024, the nutribullet® Portable Blender brings convenience and ease to blending anytime and anywhere.

news.headline: Relm expands with 50-state MGA, appoints Keith Lavigne as head of underwriting. Mission to provide innovative insurance.
news.summary: Relm Insurance is taking a significant step in its mission to offer innovative insurance solutions in advanced markets with the appointment of Keith Lavigne as the Head of Underwriting - US. The company, based in Hamilton, Bermuda, made this announcement on December 11, 2024. This move is part of Relm's strategy to expand its reach and enhance its offerings to a wider customer base. Keith Lavigne, an insurance industry veteran, brings valuable experience to the role and is expected to lead the underwriting efforts in the US market. This decision underscores Relm's commitment to growth and excellence in the insurance sector.

news.headline: SamanTree Medical reports 67% reduction in reoperation rates for breast-conserving surgery at the 2024 SABCS.
news.summary: In Boston, SamanTree Medical revealed positive outcomes from the SHIELD study, to be shared at the 2024 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium. The study highlighted that their product, the Histolog® Scanner, a confocal laser microscope, notably decreased reoperation occurrences in breast-conserving surgeries (BCS) from 30% to 10%. This reduction signifies a remarkable 67% decrease in reoperation rates. The innovative imaging device displayed significant advancements in oncologic surgical imaging.

news.headline: 9amHealth first virtual cardiometabolic care provider to achieve CDC's highest recognition for diabetes prevention.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that a particular cohort has exceeded national averages, establishing a superior benchmark for diabetes prevention among employers and health plans. The company 9amHealth, a prominent virtual cardiometabolic care platform, has been recognized by the CDC with Full Plus Recognition for its efforts in diabetes prevention. This achievement signifies a noteworthy advancement in combating diabetes and highlights the effectiveness of the cohort's approach. The development, unveiled in San Diego on December 11, 2024, underscores the impact of innovative strategies in surpassing prevailing standards in healthcare.

news.headline: Avathon AI becomes a Unicorn Community member at 2025 Davos Meeting, leading AI platform. #Disruption #Innovation.
news.summary: In Pleasanton, California on December 11th, 2024, Avathon, a company offering a top AI platform for industrial operations, announced its membership in the World Economic Forum's Unicorn Community. This exclusive community is designed for private companies experiencing rapid growth, recognized for their pioneering work in disruption and innovation.

news.headline: TelevisaUnivision hosts annual fundraiser for St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital. Event raised money for the cause with help from Hispanic media and Latin music stars.SetActive(Media)/Uforia, iHeart, and WAPA Media Group supported fundraising efforts. Event on Dec. 5 and 6 aimed to encourage donations from listeners to support St. Jude's mission of saving children.
news.summary: In Memphis, Tennessee, the annual St. Jude Promesa y Esperanza® (Promise and Hope) event took place on December 5 and 6. The event aimed to support the lifesaving mission of St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital® in finding cures and saving children. Members of Hispanic media, as well as Latin music stars, came together for this cause. Uforia, iHeart, and WAPA Media Group radio stations collaborated with celebrities and social media influencers to motivate listeners to become Ángeles de Esperanza (Angels of Hope) by committing to a monthly donation.

news.headline: Little Caesars is bringing back Stuffed Crazy Crust Pizza for $9. Prices may vary. Available from December 16.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 11, 2024, Little Caesars revealed the highly anticipated comeback of its beloved Stuffed Crazy Crust pizza. The cheesy and flavorful crust delight will be available nationwide starting December 16. Pizza enthusiasts can savor this iconic item at a national price point of [specific price to be inserted].

news.headline: F45 and Magic Johnson Enterprises partner to inspire youth fitness, donating over 4,000 F45 Fit Kits nationwide.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, F45 Training, a prominent community-based group fitness company, has partnered with Magic Johnson Enterprises (MJE), an investment conglomerate established by the renowned athlete Earvin “Magic” Johnson. The collaboration aims to motivate children to cultivate enduring habits of physical activity, self-assurance, and overall well-being. The joint effort will involve the donation of over 4,000 F45 Fit Kits to enhance the health and fitness of youngsters nationwide. F45 Training's objective is to empower members to prioritize their health and wellness, and this initiative aligns with their mission.

news.headline: Bloom Energy partners with HPS and IDF for project funding, to acquire 19MW of Energy Servers.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Bloom Energy (NYSE: BE), known for stationary fuel cell power generation, revealed a financing collaboration with HPS Investment Partners and Industrial Development Funding (IDF). The partnership involves the acquisition of 19 MW of Bloom’s Energy Servers and advanced on-site microgrid solutions by HPS and IDF. This deal marks a significant step for the company alongside the global infrastructure capital providers.

news.headline: Aventon Companies appoints Tom Suminski as Senior MD of Development in Orlando office; expanding its presence in real estate.
news.summary: Tom Suminski, a seasoned real estate professional, is set to join Aventon Companies in their Orlando office. The firm, known for its work as a multifamily developer and general contractor in the Mid-Atlantic and Southeast regions, made the announcement on December 11, 2024. Aventon Companies currently has numerous projects underway in the area.

news.headline: Corebridge Financial Research shows 19% of retired women find retirement as expected, 26% see it differently. Expensive surprise with 50% finding it costlier, reveals study.
news.summary: A recent study by Corebridge Financial in Houston delves into the financial experiences of retired women compared to their initial expectations, offering valuable insights for prospective retirees. Findings indicate that just 19% of retired women are encountering retirement exactly as anticipated, while 26% express that retirement does not align with their expectations. The research highlights that 50% of retired women cite cost as the most prevalent surprise, with many indicating that retirement is proving to be more expensive than anticipated.

news.headline: Endeavor 3D partners with CADmore to boost additive manufacturing in Southeast US, enhancing engineering design services.
news.summary: Endeavor 3D, a contract manufacturer based in Douglasville, Georgia, has recently announced a new collaboration with CADmore to enhance their engineering design services for additive design and manufacturing. This partnership aims to bolster Endeavor 3D's regional footprint and support the latest advancements in the industry. The collaboration comes as part of the company's efforts to expand their capabilities and stay at the forefront of innovation. The partnership was announced on December 11, 2024.

news.headline: Convergent Energy and Power secures financing from Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group to boost its energy storage projects.
news.summary: In New York, Convergent Energy and Power (Convergent), a prominent provider of distributed energy storage solutions in North America, has recently finalized a financial deal with Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group (MUFG). The agreement includes a programmatic construction-to-term loan, tax equity bridge loan, and letter of credit facility. This funding from MUFG will facilitate Convergent in expediting the construction of its energy storage and solar PV projects throughout North America. The arrangement is designed to provide the necessary capital for this endeavor.

news.headline: Principal Foundation named the 2024 Money Chronicles winner and 19 finalists, promoting financial security through creative storytelling.
news.summary: Today, in Des Moines, Iowa, the Principal® Foundation, a global nonprofit aiming to assist individuals and communities in establishing secure financial futures, revealed the selection of one champion and 19 runners-up for its Money Chronicles: A Story Initiative, a nationwide short storytelling contest.

news.headline: WebMD Ignite launches improved programmatic advertising with precise targeting for efficient campaigns. Premium partnerships included.
news.summary: Ignite Programmatic, based in Newark, N.J., on December 11, 2024, offers highly targeted advertising solutions to improve campaign efficiency. They leverage first-party data, audience modeling, proprietary tools, and strategic partnerships to enhance advertising performance.

news.headline: Wellness Pet partners with Best Friends Pet Care to provide premium nutrition for furry guests at locations nationwide.
news.summary: With winter holiday travel approaching, Wellness Pet will provide scientifically-backed high-quality food and treats for pets staying at their locations across the country. This initiative aims to promote better health and well-being for pet guests. The announcement was made in Burlington, Mass., on Dec. 11, 2024.
